entry.title: New: RES26-103 (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
ACCEPTING A GIFT OF TUITION, TRAVEL, AND RELATED EXPENSES, VALUED AT $2,463.80 TO THE CITY FROM THE AMERICAN ASSOCIATION OF MOTOR VEHICLE ADMINISTRATORS ("AAMVA") FOR A REPRESENTATIVE OF THE DEPARTMENT OF FACILITY MAINTENANCE TO ATTEND THE 2026 FEDERAL MOTOR CARRIER SAFETY ADMINISTRATION/AAMVA COMMERCIAL DRIVER LICENSE COORDINATORS/IT MEETING IN SAN ANTONIO, TEXAS, FROM MAY 12 TO 14, 2026.

Latest action: Adopted.

View on the council site
